name: euclides-test
description: Euclides Test — Arena de minigames matemáticos com ranking global (Dia da Matemática)

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @ddm/shared && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @ddm/server" "npm run dev -w @ddm/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ddm/shared && npm run build -w @ddm/server && npm run build -w @ddm/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ddm/shared && npm run typecheck -w @ddm/server && npm run typecheck -w @ddm/client
